heading: Pitfall: visible course access is not course management permission
notes: New repository-normalization permission pitfall; class-linked course visibility is not management authority.

heading: Pitfall: patching mojibake-rendered exception strings can corrupt Python syntax
notes: PowerShell mojibake display can corrupt multilingual Python strings; verify bytes/compile and patch the smallest syntactic unit.

heading: Pitfall: Playwright external-runner API readiness can time out before slow FastAPI startup finishes
notes: External runner may time out its fixed API readiness window before slow FastAPI startup completes; record and retry after checking residual processes.

heading: Pitfall: Playwright array containment does not apply asymmetric string matchers to array elements
notes: toContain(expect.stringContaining(...)) does not test each string element; use some/includes or toContainEqual for substring checks.
